hypothesis: The v4k residual-add plus tied-vocab output-head selftest is ready to package for a later human board replay without running any board command in this no-board invocation. The useful work in this slice is to pin the off-board evidence, exact rebuild targets, and later board commands so the next hardware session can be a narrow execution gate instead of another planning pass.

off_board_evidence.covered_path: int8 L2 MLP c_fc to post-GELU to c_proj to residual add to tied-vocab streamed top1 output head

later_human_board_gate.block_reason: no board access in this run
pass_criteria: FPGA DONE is observed by the human board session only
self-test readout reports expected v4k top index 1321 and accumulator 52140, or any mismatch is captured with raw readout
status and artifact explicitly mark the result as hardware evidence only after board access exists

commands.cmd: sed reads of AUTONIGHT_STATUS.md and required Task 6 evidence artifacts

commands.failure: bwrap: loopback: Failed RTM_NEWADDR: Operation not permitted
bwrap: loopback: Failed RTM_NEWADDR: Operation not permitted

commands.cmd: rg --files scripts rtl tests artifacts/task6/parallel-hypotheses artifacts/task6/autonight | rg ...
commands.failure: bwrap: loopback: Failed RTM_NEWADDR: Operation not permitted
bwrap: loopback: Failed RTM_NEWADDR: Operation not permitted

commands.cmd: sed write of compact prepared-package JSON

validation.method: static package reconciliation from checked-in artifacts plus sed readback
validation.hardware_block_reason: no board access in this run

decision.rationale: The existing v4k off-board evidence is strong enough to define a later board gate, but this invocation cannot execute or claim hardware results. The package keeps the board step narrow and prevents accidental hardware commands during the no-board run.
decision.next_gate: Recover executable tooling if needed, then either run the Q0.24 comparator cutout off-board or wait for a human board session to execute this prepared v4k package. Do not start full TinyStories synthesis or DDR3 integration first.
